LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'S HEARING ON DIANA J. WEECH'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS OFF CALENDAR. THE SHERIFF TERMINATED THE LEVY BECAUSE THE CREDITOR'S ATTORNEY MISSED THE STATUTORY FILING DEADLINE WITH THE SHERIFF FOR NOTICE OF HEARING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.'s HEARING ON DIANA J. WEECH'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is off calendar. The Sheriff terminated the levy because the creditor's attorney missed the statutory filing deadline with the Sheriff for Notice of Hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2011 Off Calendar
